title: Country Life: Powered by bullocks, a Northland family farms without fossil fuels
description: Bullocks and horses power the Land family farm in the Hokianga where three generations live off-grid, growing practically all their own food without the need for fossil fuels.

title: Farmers for Climate Action say renewables answer to fossil fuel disruption
description: Farmers for Climate Action (FCA) wants energy security by using Australian sun and wind rather than relying on volatile global [...] The post Farmers for Climate Action say renewables answer to fossil fuel disruption appeared first on The Islander .

title: Rare ‘Earthtongue’ fungus found in ancient woodland is new species for UK
description: Discovery of Blue-Based Earthtongue fungus in West Sussex comes almost 20 years after species was first recognised in Spain

title: AI’s arrival complicates Big Tech climate goals, and some worry it’s locking in more fossil fuels
description: The artificial intelligence race is complicating tech companies' commitments to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
